title: Nekkies fire: Damage still unknown
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Multiple homes have reportedly...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Multiple homes have reportedly burned down in the Nekkies area this afternoon. The exact number of affected families remains unknown. Emergency services are on the scene. More details to follow as the situation develops.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Multiple homes have reportedly burned down in the Nekkies area this afternoon.
